title: School Supplies - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > School Supplies 12 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth ool Supplies Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Homeless Youth ARK PROJECT OF COOS COUNTY ARK OF COOS COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides basic needs, essential support services, crisis intervention, and advocacy. Services include a drop-in center, food pantry, children's clothing, school supplies, personal grooming supplies, feminine hygiene supplies, mentoring, information and referrals for other assistance agencies, and assistance in applying for identification. 817 S 10th Street Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 and their families who are experiencing homelessness Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 1pm-5pm Summer: Tuesday-Wednesday 1pm-5pm (541) 267-3104 7115 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BLUE MOUNTAIN COMMUNITY COLLEGE THE FOOD DEN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides personal hygiene items such as toilet paper, toothbrushes, menstrual care products, and shelf-stable pantry items. Some frozen and plant based options are also offered. Limited school supplies such as pencils and notebooks. All items are subject to availability. 2411 NW Carden Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday 9am-noon, Thursday by appointment only Email (541) 276-1260 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BUSINESS FOR EXCELLENCE IN YOUTH STUFF A BUS SCHOOL SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides school supplies to students throughout the year. PO Box 843 Neotsu, OR 97364 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm Email (541) 994-4968 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BUSINESS FOR EXCELLENCE IN YOUTH OCEANLAKE ELEMENTARY STUFF A BUS SCHOOL SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides school supplies to students throughout the year. 2420 NE 22nd Street Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm Email (541) 994-4968 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BUSINESS FOR EXCELLENCE IN YOUTH TAFT ELEMENTARY STUFF A BUS SCHOOL SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides school supplies to students throughout the year. 4040 SW High School Drive Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm Email (541) 994-4968 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BUSINESS FOR EXCELLENCE IN YOUTH TAFT HIGH STUFF A BUS SCHOOL SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides school supplies to students throughout the year. 3780 Spy Glass Ridge Road Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm Email (541) 994-4968 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ELYSIUM SANCTUARY FAMILY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, shoes, school supplies, and birthday party supplies for foster families, and shares information about community events and activities through published or online calendars Confidential Mailing Address Eligibility: Resource (Foster) families Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website More Details IFOSTER FOSTER YOUTH RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Online resource for foster and former foster youth to access programs that help provide various services PO Box 159 Truckee, CA 96160 Eligibility: Current and former foster children ages 16-24 (older ages may be accepted). Current and former kinship youth, and crossover youth Hours: Not applicable Email (855) 936-7837 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INFORMATIONAL RECORD SCHOOL SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Many schools receive assistance through school supply drives and corporate donations. Assistance may include backpacks, laptops, or Chromebooks for at-home use during the school year, home internet access/ hot spot assistance, and school supplies such as pencils, crayons, and notebooks. Assistance varies by the school district and funding availability and is not guaranteed. Parents or caregivers can contact the child's school or school district to find out if they offer school supplies for students in need. Families experiencing homelessness can also contact the McKinney-Vento homeless liaison at their school. More Details NORTH CLACKAMAS SCHOOL DISTRICT WICHITA CENTER FOR FAMILY AND COMMUNITY FAMILY SUPPORT CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a clothes closet, food pantry, school supplies, hygiene supplies, and support for North Clackamas School District students (NCSD) 6031 SE King Road Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Food pantry: Families with children within the NCSD boundries All other services: Students enrolled in NCSD Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-6pm, Wednesday 10am-4pm Email (503) 353-5663 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPERATION HOMEFRONT BACK TO SCHOOL BRIGADE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides backpacks filled with school supplies. Donations accepted year-round. 17319 San Pedro Avenue Suite 505 San Antonio, TX 78232 Eligibility: Dependent children of: -Post 9/11 wounded, ill, or injured service member of any rank, both currently serving and those no longer serving in the military or -All ranks, Active Duty, Guard and Reserves, any duty status or -Transitioning service members within 12 months of their discharge or retirement date Hours: Varies by location; check website Email (210) 659-7756 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUR FOSTER KIDS SCHOOL SUPPLIES AND CHRISTMAS PRESENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides back-to-school supplies, Christmas gifts, and birthday cards 1212 SW L Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: School age children in foster care Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 441-7458 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARK PROJECT OF COOS COUNTY ARK OF COOS COUNTY BLUE MOUNTAIN COMMUNITY COLLEGE THE FOOD DEN BUSINESS FOR EXCELLENCE IN YOUTH STUFF A BUS SCHOOL SUPPLIES BUSINESS FOR EXCELLENCE IN YOUTH STUFF A BUS SCHOOL SUPPLIES BUSINESS FOR EXCELLENCE IN YOUTH STUFF A BUS SCHOOL SUPPLIES BUSINESS FOR EXCELLENCE IN YOUTH STUFF A BUS SCHOOL SUPPLIES NORTH CLACKAMAS SCHOOL DISTRICT FAMILY SUPPORT CENTER OUR FOSTER KIDS SCHOOL SUPPLIES AND CHRISTMAS PRESENTS
